sourceNote: Modern Magic Play Booster (14 cards). Unlike Pokemon/One Piece, WotC discloses the collation, so this is closer to official than community estimate - but it is still modelled and capped at LOW confidence for the reasons below. Structure used: ~7 commons + ~3 uncommons per pack (guaranteed slots), one guaranteed rare-or-mythic slot (mythic ~13.5% of the time), plus a wildcard slot and a traditional-foil slot that each occasionally add another rare/mythic. This model uses the one guaranteed rare-or-mythic slot directly (rare 0.865, mythic 0.135). The wildcard slot and the traditional-foil slot each add roughly another ~0.2 rares/mythics per pack on average - those are NOT modelled here (the modelled hit slots sum to 1.0 per pack by construction), so this pack EV is deliberately CONSERVATIVE / understated by that amount. IMPORTANT approximations: (1) special treatments - showcase, borderless, extended-art - are folded into the flat common/uncommon/rare/mythic tiers with a uniform-within-tier assumption, which OVERSTATES the odds of the specific expensive alt-treatment prints; (2) prices are the NON-FOIL TCGplayer market price (via Scryfall) — a pack's guaranteed slots are all non-foil; the single foil slot's extra value is not added to EV (conservative). Only cards Scryfall marks booster:true are counted, so promos, box-toppers and Commander-deck cards are excluded. Net effect is a rough, indicative pack EV, not a precise one.
